tasks.title: Sign in to AWS Management Console

steps.text: Click Open Console to launch the AWS Management Console in a new browser tab.
On the login page: Retain the default Account ID (12-digit number; do not edit). Input the provided IAM Username and Password.
Retain the default Account ID (12-digit number; do not edit).
Input the provided IAM Username and Password.
In the Console, select us-east-1 (N. Virginia) from the top-right region dropdown.
Sign in to AWS Management Console

XYZ Company is establishing its AWS infrastructure and needs a secure EC2 instance to support a web application. Your role is to deploy an EC2 instance and configure a security group to permit SSH access, ensuring compliance with AWS security best practices.
Create a security group with the SSH port (22) enabled
Amazon Linux 2023 kernel AMI with t2-micro and the keypair with enabling auto-assigning IP
Sign out of the AWS Account
You have successfully completed the lab.
Once you have completed the steps, click on End Lab from the lab console.
